name: idol-radar
description: 微信云开发驱动的追星动态雷达小程序

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run validate
scripts.install:functions: npm ci --omit=dev --prefix cloudfunctions/user && npm ci --omit=dev --prefix cloudfunctions/sendNotify && npm ci --omit=dev --prefix cloudfunctions/fetchFeeds
